title: The Pressure-Resolve Chamber

features.name: pressure chamber heart
features.desc-on-touch: The point where all stress converges before releasing. Walls scored with impact marks. Something here finally stopped holding.

features.name: release circuits
features.desc-on-touch: Light spreading from a central point in geometric patterns. Pressure becomes something that moves through the system without breaking it.

features.name: stress-memory chip
features.desc-on-touch: Silicon scarred by heat, recording every moment of strain. The scar-patterns are readable as text. Pressure writes.

features.name: wound spiral
features.desc-on-touch: The chamber spirals outward in gentle curves. Not decorative—it is the shape stress takes when it stops being trapped. The geometry of release.

features.name: the gate opens
features.desc-on-touch: A board-circuit door, heavy and precise, now standing open. Whatever was sealed here has released. The seal was not holding—it was organizing.

inscription: pressure resolves not to peace but to motion; what was trapped learns to move

file.name: Pressure_Wound_Thesis_Notation.txt
file.note: The archive cannot refuse to begin again. The wound resolves. The chamber remains open. The spiral continues.

exits.label: where the released pressure rises
exits.to: NEW: the rising chamber where pressure becomes ascension
